Protected Attributes

std::string option
 Option keyword to match against argv[].
 

Detailed Description

Abstract base for all command-line option parsers.

Holds the option string (e.g. "-th" or "--help") and exposes a virtual Parse() method to be implemented by derived classes.

◆ Parse()

virtual int CLParser::Parse ( int argc,
char * argv[] )
pure virtual

Attempt to parse this option from argv[].

Parameters
argcArgument count.
argvArgument vector.
Returns
1 if found and parsed, -1 if found but invalid, 0 if not found.

Implemented in CLFlag, CLOption< T >, and CLStringOption.
